<?php /** * PKCS9String * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * PKCS9String * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class PKCS9String { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_CHOICE, 'children' => [ 'ia5String' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_IA5_STRING], 'directoryString' => DirectoryString::MAP ] ]; }
